steps.t: The spiders' eggs can be found among their nests in Amon Ros, west of Ost Guruth. After telling you of the loss of his wife and son to the spiders of …
Tortwil awaits your return in Ost Guruth, east of Amon Ros. You found the egg sacs in the shadows of Amon Ros and destroyed them as Tortwil requested.…
